text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enter the fall season of the Classics, and the
media is abuzz with speculation. Expecting
Tamamo Cross to peak her senior year, they've
dubbed her the "Secret Weapon of Ritto."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Displeased by this assessment, Tamamo Cross
becomes determined to take the Kikuka Sho for
herself.
